era_context: Iron Age II. Shalmaneser III's reign continues. The Levant remains under Assyrian hegemony. Greece is in the early Archaic period. Egypt is fragmented under the late 21st Dynasty.
geographic_coverage_gaps: Most of the Mediterranean world outside Assyrian records
disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified. No events are documented for this specific year.
historiographic_note: The historical record for 811 BCE is extremely sparse. No specific events are documented in surviving sources. The year falls within the reign of Shalmaneser III, but royal inscriptions do not provide year-by-year detail. This reflects the general limitation of ancient historical sources: most years leave no specific documentary trace, and only major events or reign-level summaries are recorded.
